title: FPS MAX
description: Enhanced performance and stability for Minecraft
body:
·Significant FPS increase and smoother gameplay.
·Reduced lag and lag spikes (sudden stuttering).
·Faster loading times (especially the startup screen and teleporting).
·Lower ping and improved connection for online multiplayer.
·Greater stability and fewer random crashes (especially on servers).

Important Note: This packonly optimizes the areas mentioned above. It does not add any new graphical elements (such as shaders, texture packs, or effects). Any perceived visual improvement in some versions is solely due to better performance and more efficient rendering.


<details>
<summary>Recommended launcher and renderer on Android</summary>

[Suggested render for Android devices](https://github.com/MobileGL-Dev/MobileGlues-release)

[A launcher that Android users 
will love.](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher)




</details>


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
🎯 MobileGlues Renderer Settings Guide

📱 For Phones Similar to Samsung M12

📋 Supported Phones:
- Samsung Galaxy M12, M02s, A12, A02s
- Redmi 9, 9A, 9C, 9 Prime
- Realme C11, C12, C15
- Infinix Hot 10, Hot 10 Play
- Tecno Spark 6, Spark 7

⚙️ Supported Processors:
Exynos 850, Snapdragon 450, 460, 662, MediaTek Helio G25, G35, P22, P35

🎮 Supported GPUs:
Mali-G52, Mali-G31, Adreno 610, Adreno 505, PowerVR GE8320

🔧 Settings for M12-type Phones:

{"enableANGLE":3,"enableNoError":0,"enableExtGL43":0,"enableExtTimerQuery":0,"enableExtComputeShader":0,"enableExtDirectStateAccess":0,"maxGlslCacheSize":256,"multidrawMode":0,"angleDepthClearFixMode":0,"customGLVersion":0,"fsr1Setting":1}

📱 For Phones Similar to Samsung A10

📋 Supported Phones:
- Samsung Galaxy A10, A10s, A20, A20s
- Redmi 7, 7A, 8, 8A
- Realme C2, C3, C11 (2020)
- Infinix Hot 8, Hot 9
- Tecno Spark 4, Spark 5

⚙️ Supported Processors:
Exynos 7884, Snapdragon 439, 450, 625, MediaTek MT6762, MT6739, Helio A22, P22

🎮 Supported GPUs:
Mali-G71 MP2, Mali-G52, Adreno 506, PowerVR GE8320, GE8100

🔧 Settings for A10-type Phones:

{"enableANGLE":2,"enableNoError":0,"enableExtGL43":0,"enableExtTimerQuery":0,"enableExtComputeShader":0,"enableExtDirectStateAccess":0,"maxGlslCacheSize":16,"multidrawMode":1,"angleDepthClearFixMode":0,"customGLVersion":32,"fsr1Setting":0}

🚀 How to Use:
1. Find your phone or processor in the lists above
2. Copy the corresponding JSON line
3. Paste into renderer config.json file
4. Restart the game

💡 Important Tips:
- M12 phones: Higher cache + FSR1 enabled
- A10 phones: OpenGL 3.2 + Lower memory usage

Choose the right settings for your device!

</details>
